codeReview.summary: Clean, focused implementation that fully satisfies all feature requirements. Updated .githooks/pre-commit from cagent to cogent, removed --codex-openai-bridge flag and related logic from scripts/ops/validate-local-provider-matrix.sh, cleaned .gitignore of deprecated adapter homes (.codex/, .opencode/, .gemini/, .pi/), and removed both opencode.json files from the repository surface. All verification steps passed including workspace tests, clippy, nix flake check, and feature-specific grep/shell assertions.

summary: Feature 'remove-deprecated-adapter-surfaces' successfully completed. The worker correctly identified and committed the in-scope changes that were already staged in the worktree (per orchestrator note), executed comprehensive validation including all required verification steps, and properly stashed the unrelated pre-existing dioxus-desktop/src/types/generated.ts diff to leave a clean worktree. The implementation is precise, scoped correctly per mission boundaries (active hooks/scripts/config/root files only, not archive docs), and all validators passed. No issues found.
